seoTitle: East Hills vs East Kangaloon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between East Hills and East Kangaloon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: East Hills vs East Kangaloon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Hills and East Kangaloon.
heading: East Hills vs East Kangaloon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Hills, New South Wales and East Kangaloon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to East Kangaloon (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Hills or East Kangaloon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Hills has a flood risk score of 42/100, while East Kangaloon scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Hills scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. East Kangaloon scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Hills or East Kangaloon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
